e1_sentence: It has been reported by Salama bin al-Akwa':  We fought the Battle of Hawazin along with the Messenger of Allah (may peace  be upon him)
e2_sentence: He said: Everything of the man is  for him (Ibn Akwa')

e1_sentence: (One day) when we were having our breakfast with the Messenger  of Allah (may peace he upon him), a man came riding a red camel
